message.content:
@startuml
title Search for Products by ID (using DB dao)

actor User
participant "«main»\nAdministration" as Administration #palegreen/pink
frame MainMenu { }
dialog ProductReportDialog { }
database Database #pink/lightblue
entity SimpleListModel:model #lightyellow/gray;model : model <<Simple List Model>>#90EE90;line:green;text:red


User -> Administration: clicks 'View Products' 
activate Administration 

note right of 15\nproducts now visible to user  
end note  

loop while searching products do    
    alt if product found then        
        return true     
     else         
         throw new Exception("Product not Found")      
      end       
   endif   
endif   

deactivate administration    

@enduml
